label: Omnishannon 6x6x6x12 Device-Specific Wave
summary: Use memory and index first, then run a six-by-six-by-six wave matrix with twelve delayed self-reflection slots under device-specific Omnishannon routing.

scoutLanes.label: Kernel Core
scoutLanes.question: What is live and portable on this host right now?

scoutLanes.label: Spawn / PID / Orchestrator
scoutLanes.question: Which PID/profile chain is actually controlling this wave?

scoutLanes.label: Index Runtime
scoutLanes.question: What does the running index already know that should not be rediscovered?

scoutLanes.label: Device Boundary
scoutLanes.question: What exact device truth is visible on USB right now?

scoutLanes.label: Phone Memory
scoutLanes.question: What phone/runbook memory should stay paired to the device boundary?

scoutLanes.label: Host Root
scoutLanes.question: What owner-gated boundary remains on this host?

backlineLanes.label: Provenance
backlineLanes.question: What source is canonical for this device state?

backlineLanes.label: Quarantine
backlineLanes.question: What must remain blocked until exact packet proof appears?

backlineLanes.label: Transport Truth
backlineLanes.question: Is USB only visible, or is ADB actually live?

backlineLanes.label: Route Truth
backlineLanes.question: What route is valid on this machine right now?

backlineLanes.label: Dispatch Bounds
backlineLanes.question: What work must stay bounded to admitted surfaces only?
